caption: A man with glasses and a mustache stands in front of a microphone, performing with an acoustic guitar. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a dark embroidered vest and a red beaded necklace. He is positioned against a background of horizontal wooden slats. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they watch the performance. On the right side of the scene, a purple speech bubble contains the white text "ORCA". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, singing into the microphone and playing his guitar, while the audience members in the foreground remain relatively still. The lighting is consistent across the scene, and there are no significant changes in the environment or the characters' actions between the frames.
